Free Meet & Greet!

Before your first booking, I always offer a complimentary in-home meet-and-greet — so your cat and I can get acquainted before you ever leave town.

Schedule Yours
What We Offer

Every Visit, with Heart

Each drop-in includes everything your cat needs to feel happy and loved.

🍽️

Feeding & Fresh Water

Your cat's specific food routine, followed exactly — wet, dry, raw, or prescription diets.

🚮

Litter Box Care

Scooped and freshened every visit so your cat always has a clean space.

🧶

Playtime & Affection

Interactive play, brushing, and lap time — as much or as little as your cat prefers.

💊

Medication Administration

Experienced with oral meds, injections (insulin), subcutaneous fluids, and eye/ear drops.

📸

Photo Updates

A detailed visit report with photos sent to you after every single visit.

🐱🐱

Multi-Cat Households

Managing complex feline dynamics with patience and care.

Why HomePaws?

Cat care that feels like family

I'm not just a pet sitter — I'm a lifelong cat lover who understands that your cat is family. Every visit is personal, attentive, and centered around your cat's comfort.

Based in Chippewa Falls, WI, I serve a 30-mile radius and have experience with cats of all personalities — from social butterflies to shy introverts.

  • Experience with medical needs and special care
  • Consistent caregiver — no strangers in your home
  • Your cat stays in their own environment, stress-free
  • Free meet & greet before every new booking
Get in Touch
Transparent Pricing

Simple, Honest Rates

No hidden fees. Just reliable, loving care at a fair price.

Drop-In — 30 min

$ 25 starting at / visit

Feeding, litter, playtime & love

Popular

Drop-In — 45 min

$ 34 starting at / visit

Everything above plus extra play & cuddle time

Drop-In — 60 min

$ 40 starting at / visit

Full hour of care, grooming & enrichment

Overnight Stay

$ 110 starting at / night

7 PM to 7 AM, includes all standard care plus bedtime routine

Add-Ons

Additional cat: +$6 per visit
Injections / medical care: +$10 per visit
Holiday visits: +$15 per visit

Something Extra

In-Home Cat Boarding

Prefer your cat to have a cozy home away from home? I've got you covered.

🏡

Your Cat's Own Private Room — starting at $60/night

I'm happy to welcome your cat into my home! They'll have their own dedicated space — a large, comfortable room stocked with everything they need to feel right at home.

  • 🛏️ Private room — just for your cat
  • 🧸 All accessories provided (beds, toys, litter, scratching posts)
  • 🔍 Just bring their food and any medications
  • 📸 Daily photo updates so you can see them thriving
  • ❤️ Calm, quiet home environment — no dogs
Good to Know

Cancellation Policy

Life happens — here's how I handle changes to bookings.

📅

48+ Hours Notice

Full refund — no questions asked.

⏳

24–48 Hours Notice

50% refund of the booking total.

🚨

Less Than 24 Hours

No refund — time has been reserved for your pet.
